profile.name: Dean Yang
profile.bio: Experienced Full Stack Engineer with a strong focus on backend development and cloud-native architecture. Transitioning from a successful career in physical therapy, I combine empathy and analytical skills to drive innovation. Notable achievements include leading a migration from Node.js to Java that boosted performance by over 30%, and developing enterprise-level systems using Docker, AWS, and CI/CD pipelines. Passionate about building products that meet international standards and enhance user experience.

items.description: Key contributor in transforming our Restaurant Management System by migrating from Node.js to Java, resulting in a performance boost of over 30% and significant reductions in latency and downtime. Spearheaded migration to Java, improving system performance by over 30%. Developed a cloud-based reservation system using Spring Boot and PostgresSQL, increasing booking efficiency by 35%.

projects.name: Core System Migration
projects.description: Led the migration from Node.js to Java Spring Boot, refactoring monolith to microservices architecture, significantly improving system stability.

projects.name: Cloud Reservation API
projects.description: Designed and implemented high-concurrency booking APIs supporting multi-store and real-time inventory deduction.

items.description: Progressed from a junior role to a full stack developer, delivering a comprehensive recycling car tracking system. Developed an end-to-end tracking system using Spring Boot and Android for real-time logistics insights. Instituted streamlined workflows that enhanced team productivity and code quality.
Delivered personalized physical therapy sessions and successfully negotiated business collaborations, showcasing strong communication and client relationship skills.
